@graph.name: Lumina Notes
@graph.description: Secure, real-time notes and study-sharing app for college students

mainEntity.name: How can I secure my notes on Lumina?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lumina allows you to secure notes by clicking the padlock icon in the editor, entering a password, and saving. This hashes the password on the database, making the content readable only to those with the password.

mainEntity.name: What does it mean to finalize a note or file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Finalizing a note or file locks its contents permanently as a read-only document. Once finalized, nobody can modify or overwrite it, ensuring notes remain intact.

mainEntity.name: Can I email notes directly from the platform?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, clicking the 'Email' button inside the reader or editor prompts you for an email address, which then sends the note content using our secure mailing integration.

mainEntity.name: Can I upload diagrams or study photos to the gallery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can upload whiteboard photos, diagrams, and cheat sheets to the Gallery. Like notes, gallery uploads can be password-protected or finalized.
